The '''Thyferran Home Defense Corps''' was a defense force founded by the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Ysanne Isard]] during her rule of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

==History==
Built from components from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]], including [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]], plus volunteers from the [[Xucphra Corporation]], the Home Defense Force was intended to protect Isard's control of the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]]-producing world during the [[Bacta War]], during which the corps was led by [[Erisi Dlarit]]. After the [[Battle of Thyferra]] the THDC was disbanded and replaced by the [[Thyferran Aerospace Defense Force]].
